text.title: User Research at Scale Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the User Research at Scale methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: intake
step.action: Classify by study type + segment + tier; queue.

step.name: sampling
step.action: Stratified sampling design + recruit batch sizes.

step.name: instrument-and-collect
step.action: Run sessions / unmoderated tests; record consent + transcripts.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to proceed without consent records.

step.name: transcribe
step.action: Run vendor transcription; strip interviewer turns.

step.name: code-frozen-book
step.action: Apply frozen codes; route novel themes to proposed_codes.

step.name: synthesize
step.action: Opus aggregates across studies; emits candidate findings with evidence counts.

step.name: hitl-review
step.action: Human review; pass/reject per finding; merge accepted codes into book.
step.decision-gate: Refuse publish if evidence<50 / sessions<10 / segments<2.

step.name: publish-and-distribute
step.action: Push to Dovetail/Notion with idempotency keys; emit weekly report.
